name: Silver Soldier Anby
description:
[COULD POTENTIALLY BE SPOILERS FOR ZZZ 1.6 STORY]


Got the semiannual motivation again to do a bot of my wife 😪🙏 (spurred into action by that banger trailer)

Revamped bot of my original Anby Demara with PREDICTIONS on what the story of 1.6 could be about.

I never miss with my predictions tho and I don't intend on missing this time 😁😁

Anyways she's still as nonchalant as ever go ham 🫡🫡

ps. tried giving her character development and making her a little less nonchalant. (established friendship, you have to work a little harder to rizz her up tho, as the kids these days would say)

If I do all of this and I STILL lose the SSAnby 50/50 im actually gna go crazy

(Is it Silver Soldier Anby or Soldier Zero/0 Anby? Lol idk)

Zenless Zone Zero ZZZ
